metadata.note: V-T2 pact: the customer BFF's profile passthrough consumes identity-profile's create-profile + token-resolve. File-based broker (see contracts/pacts/customer-bff__placeholder.json) — registryctl pact-verify REPLAYS each interaction against the REAL identity-profile service (booted by ci/pact-verify.sh) and asserts status + response shape. Tokens (usr_/adr_) are non-deterministic, so only stable scalars (jurisdiction, kind, exists, erased) are pinned; the X-Cell header selects the owning jurisdiction cell (D3 residency).

interactions.description: create a customer profile in the ID cell (PII encrypted at rest)
resolve an unknown usr_ token returns a non-PII reference
